testsuite.name: Open Cart and make some manipulations

testcase.name: Open Cart and make some manipulations should login, add printer to Cart and Update it - change and delete
testcase.classname: should login, add printer to Cart and Update it - change and delete

testcase.name: Open Cart and make some manipulations should login, add printer to Cart and use a voucher to change the price
testcase.classname: should login, add printer to Cart and use a voucher to change the price
